plan_metadata.name: Sample APIM GenAI Gateway Remote Debug

parameters.text: Custom Engine Agent using APIM GenAI Gateway

steps.description: Type the text 'Custom Engine Agent using APIM GenAI Gateway' into the search bar located at the top of the 'Samples' pane within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.

Click the blue "Create" button for the "Custom Engine Agent" sample in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension panel within Visual Studio Code, under the "Featured samples" section.And input ${{var:app_name:apim-genai-gateway}} into the run time variable.
Press the "Enter" key to confirm the selected folder in the "Choose the folder where your project will be located" dialog within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface in Visual Studio Code.
@assertion 'Preview README.MD' is visible
@assertion the page title contains 'Custom Engine Agent using APIM GenAI Gateway'
Right-click on the "Preview README.md" tab in the Visual Studio Code interface to interact with the file preview tab directly.
Click the "Close" option in the context menu to close the "Preview README.md" tab in Visual Studio Code.
Press key: F1 to open the command palette in the Visual Studio Code interface, within the "Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit" extension context.
Type text: 'provision' into the command palette search bar in Microsoft Visual Studio Code, which is currently open and displays filtered commands within the "Lifecycle" section.
Press the "Enter" key to select the "Microsoft 365 Agents: Provision" option from the command palette in Visual Studio Code.
Press the "Enter" key to confirm the selection in the "Select a resource group" dropdown within the Microsoft 365 Agents extension interface of Visual Studio Code.
Press 'Enter' to confirm the input in the "New resource group name" text box within the Visual Studio Code interface.
Type text: 'East US' into the location selection dropdown field labeled "Location for the new resource group" within the Microsoft 365 Agents extension interface in Visual Studio Code.
Press the "Enter" key to confirm the selection of "East US" in the dropdown menu titled "Location for the new resource group" within the Visual Studio Code interface.
Click the "Provision" button in the confirmation popup dialog, which prompts to provision resources in the development environment using listed accounts.
@assertion notification "provision stage executed successfully" exist.
Press the F1 key to open the command palette in Visual Studio Code while viewing the Explorer panel.
Type text 'Debug: Select and Start Debugging' into the Visual Studio Code Command Palette (accessible via Ctrl+Shift+P or the 'View' menu).
Press the "Enter" key to select the highlighted command "Debug: Select and Start Debugging" within the Visual Studio Code Command Palette.
Type text: 'Launch Remote in Teams (Chrome)' into the "Debug Configuration" dropdown located in the top-center of the Visual Studio Code interface, which is currently displaying debug launch options.
Press the "Enter" key to confirm the selected launch configuration ("Launch Remote in Teams (Chrome)") in the Visual Studio Code debug dropdown menu.
Click on the "Open" button within the "genai-gw-dev" app details dialog in the Microsoft Teams web interface.
Click the "Open" button within the "Let's go" popup in Microsoft Teams to proceed to the application.
Click on the "What can you do?" message card within the "genai-gw-dev" interface in the Microsoft Teams application.
Press the Enter key to send the typed message "What can you do for me?" in the chat interface of the Microsoft Teams application under the "genai-gw-dev" channel.
@assertion the page loads successfully and displays valid help content, not an error message.
